steps.name: 00_public_auth_initial.png
steps.note: Public URL loaded, Sign in button visible.

steps.name: 01_create_account_clicked.png
steps.note: Create account toggled the auth form to Register mode.

steps.name: 02_use_existing_clicked.png
steps.note: Use existing account toggled the auth form back to Sign in mode.

steps.name: 03_register_form_filled.png
steps.note: Registration form filled with a unique test user.

steps.name: 04_register_success.png
steps.note: Register button created the user and opened the chat app.

steps.name: 05_sign_in_form_filled.png
steps.note: Sign in form filled with the registered public test user.

steps.name: 06_sign_in_success.png
steps.note: Sign in button authenticated the test user.

steps.name: 07_new_chat_clicked.png
steps.note: New chat button created and selected a new analysis session.

steps.name: 08_session_button_clicked.png
steps.note: Session button in the sidebar is clickable and keeps the chat pane active.

steps.name: 09_select_controls_changed.png
steps.note: Output/style controls switched to Chart and Technical.

steps.name: 10_send_clicked_artifacts.png
steps.note: Send button submitted the query and rendered response artifacts.
